title: ChartForgeX documentation
description: Documentation entry point for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site pilot.
snippet: This dedicated site starts as a visual/demo pilot. The goal is to prove a repeatable model for Evotec projects that need more than a catalog card, without turning the main hub into a giant per-project documentation app. Use the same deploym...
searchText:
ChartForgeX documentation Documentation entry point for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site pilot. This dedicated site starts as a visual/demo pilot. The goal is to prove a repeatable model for Evotec projects that need more than a catalog card, without turning the main hub into a giant per-project documentation app. Use the same deploym... docs Page ChartForgeX documentation Documentation entry point for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site pilot. index docs docs https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/docs/ <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/themes/prism.min.css" media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/themes/prism-okaidia.min.css" media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" /> <script>(function(){window.Prism=window.Prism||{};window.Prism.manual=true;})();</script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/components/prism-core.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/plugins/autoloader/prism-autoloader.min.js"></script>
<script>(function(){var targetPath='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/components/';var attempts=0;var maxAttempts=8;var delayMs=40;var warned=false;var hasCode=function(root){return !!(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('code[class*=\"language-\"]'));};var hasTokens=function(root){return !!(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('code[class*=\"language-\"] .token'));};var run=function(){attempts++;var root=document;var p=window.Prism;if(!p||!hasCode(root)){return;}if(p.plugins&&p.plugins.autoloader){p.plugins.autoloader.languages_path=targetPath;}if(hasTokens(root)){return;}try{if(p.highlightAll){p.highlightAll();}}catch(e){if(!warned&&window.console&&console.warn){warned=true;console.warn('Prism highlighting failed.',e);}}if(!hasTokens(root)&&attempts<maxAttempts){setTimeout(run,delayMs);}};if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',run);}else{run();}})();</script>

title: Deployment
description: Deployment and local validation shape for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site.
snippet: ChartForgeX uses the dedicated project-site model: the Evotec hub keeps the catalog page, while this folder publishes the richer demo surface for https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/ . Run the library build from the repository root when the gene...
searchText:
Deployment Deployment and local validation shape for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site. ChartForgeX uses the dedicated project-site model: the Evotec hub keeps the catalog page, while this folder publishes the richer demo surface for https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/ . Run the library build from the repository root when the gene... docs Page Deployment Deployment and local validation shape for the ChartForgeX dedicated project site. deployment docs docs https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/docs/deployment/ <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/themes/prism.min.css" media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/themes/prism-okaidia.min.css" media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" /> <script>(function(){window.Prism=window.Prism||{};window.Prism.manual=true;})();</script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/components/prism-core.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/plugins/autoloader/prism-autoloader.min.js"></script>
<script>(function(){var targetPath='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/components/';var attempts=0;var maxAttempts=8;var delayMs=40;var warned=false;var hasCode=function(root){return !!(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('code[class*=\"language-\"]'));};var hasTokens=function(root){return !!(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('code[class*=\"language-\"] .token'));};var run=function(){attempts++;var root=document;var p=window.Prism;if(!p||!hasCode(root)){return;}if(p.plugins&&p.plugins.autoloader){p.plugins.autoloader.languages_path=targetPath;}if(hasTokens(root)){return;}try{if(p.highlightAll){p.highlightAll();}}catch(e){if(!warned&&window.console&&console.warn){warned=true;console.warn('Prism highlighting failed.',e);}}if(!hasTokens(root)&&attempts<maxAttempts){setTimeout(run,delayMs);}};if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',run);}else{run();}})();</script>
